name: Halvah Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tahini and sugar in a large pot. Stir over very low heat until well blended.
2. Remove from heat and add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Combine flour and baking soda and add to the mixture, blending well.
4. Add water and stir until well-blended.
5. Finally, stir in semolina and spices.
6. Pour batter into a well-greased 8 x 8 x 2 cake pan. Allow to stand for 30 minutes.
7. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F (200°C), then 15 minutes at 375°F (190°C), and 1/2 hour at 350°F (175°C). Allow cake to cool in the pan.
8. Cut into squares and pour hot syrup over the cold cake. Allow to stand in the pan until syrup is almost absorbed. Serve at room temperature.
